name: DLewis Apps
subtitle: Custom iOS apps by Dylan Lewis
description: Sideload-ready iOS apps. Includes OfflineIPTV — a resumable VOD downloader that survives HTTP 509 rate-limiting.

apps.name: OfflineIPTV
apps.subtitle: Resumable VOD downloader that survives 509 rate-limiting
apps.localizedDescription: A native iOS IPTV VOD downloader with a resumable download engine. Survives HTTP 509 rate-limiting by detecting transient errors, backing off with Retry-After headers, and resuming from the exact byte using Range requests with ETag/If-Range validation. Downloads persist across app restarts via SwiftData checkpointing.

versions.localizedDescription: Initial release with resumable 509-surviving download engine.
